title: Kenyan Raspberry Tagine
description: A sweet and tangy dessert inspired by Kenyan flavors, featuring a raspberry jam-filled tagine with a crunchy dense cookie crust.
instructions: Prepare the dense cookie crust by mixing the cookie crumbs with a pinch of salt. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch (23cm) tagine or pie dish.
Spoon the raspberry jam into the cookie crust.
Place the tagine pastry dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is warm.
Let the tagine cool for a few minutes before serving. Garnish with fresh raspberries.
